nasb.text: His head and His hair were white like white wool, like snow; and His eyes were like a flame of fire.

esv.text: The hairs of his head were white, like white wool, like snow. His eyes were like a flame of fire,

cnv.text: 他的頭和頭髮像白羊毛、像雪一樣潔白，他的眼睛好像火燄，

ccb.text: 头与发白如羊毛、洁白如雪，眼睛像火焰，

csbs.text: 他的头和头发洁白，如白羊毛、如雪；他的眼睛如同火焰；
